- When writing unit tests in Golang, we use the [require](https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/stretchr/testify) package for assertions.
- When authoring PRs ensure:
  - Title should be prefixed with the type area that it touches e.g. gadgets/trace_open, operators/ebpf, docs/, etc. Ideally the title should be 72 characters or less.
  - Use a `Fixes:` tag if the commit fixes a bug. This tag should include the first 12 characters of the commit hash introducing the bug. This can be generated by including an alias in the .gitconfig file:
    ```
    [alias]
      fixline = log -1 --abbrev=12 --format='Fixes: %h (\"%s\")'
    ```
